ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was created */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey started collecting responses */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ended data collection */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses received for the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., Draft, Active, Completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the survey */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the survey was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the survey */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Intended population for the survey */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the survey is conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple-choice, Likert scale) */,
  "question_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the question */,
  "options" TEXT /* JSON array of possible options for multiple-choice questions */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the question is mandatory */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order in which the question appears in the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the question being answered */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the respondent providing the answer */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response (could be scale value or selected option) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time the response was submitted */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to submit the response */,
  "response_duration" INTEGER /* Duration taken to complete the response */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation data of the respondent when the response was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "group" TEXT /* Demographic group the respondent belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the respondent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the respondent */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the respondent */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the respondent */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey the respondent participated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the survey being analyzed */,
  "group" TEXT /* Demographic group for the analysis */,
  "disagreement_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who disagree with survey options */,
  "response_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of responses as a JSON object */,
  "total_respondents" INTEGER /* Total number of respondents in the demographic group */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average time taken to complete the survey */,
  "most_common_response" TEXT /* Most common response in the demographic group */,
  "least_common_response" TEXT /* Least common response in the demographic group */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score derived from open-ended responses */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the analytic record was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the analytic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
